notes: Core Space Invaders mechanics are well-implemented with pixel bitmaps, shields, mystery ship, and progressive difficulty, but alien movement uses a fixed 2px step (too small) and the shield arch shape is a plain rectangle with a notch rather than the classic arch, slightly reducing authenticity.
An exceptionally well-crafted, flawless implementation of Space Invaders with accurate mechanics, pixel-perfect destructible shields, synthesized audio, and great arcade feel.

A solid and recognizable Space Invaders clone with title/game over/pause states and core shooting mechanics, but it has notable authenticity and gameplay issues like edge-trigger-only firing, very slow alien horizontal motion, shield reset every wave, and a likely bug where mystery-ship score text appears in the wrong place after destruction.
